page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8369B processors running at 2.7 GHz. The instance is configured with 256.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage options and a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks place this instance consistently in the average tier for its hardware class. The Intel Xeon processor delivers a single-core stress-ng CPU score of 1865.39 and a multi-core score of 30983.52, supported by 48 MB of L3 cache. Cryptographic and vector operations are accelerated via hardware flags including AVX-512 and AES. Memory performance is characterized by a read-only small block cached bandwidth of 1689.81 GB/sec and an uncached large block write bandwidth of 65.94 GB/sec.

In application-specific workloads, the ecs.r7.8xlarge demonstrates solid capabilities for memory-intensive tasks. It achieves 30.13 million operations per second in Redis SET benchmarks and a static web serving throughput of 28.84 GB/sec. For language model tasks, it processes 135M model text generation at a strong rate of 282.15 tokens per second, while larger 7B models run at 17.54 tokens per second. This profile makes the instance highly suitable for relational databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise application hosting, and medium-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual server featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.7 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, this instance provides 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing an 8.0 GB per core resource density. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, but offers a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. Benchmark results indicate balanced performance, with a multi-core stress-ng CPU score of 30983.52 and a Redis SET throughput of 30.13 million operations per second. The instance is well-suited for memory-intensive workloads, including database operations, in-memory caching, and enterprise application hosting.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and 16 Gbps network bandwidth, designed for databases and in-memory caching.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r7.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 dedicated Intel Xeon cores and 256 GB RAM, built for database workloads.
tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and high memory density for enterprise databases and caching.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated physical Intel Xeon 8369B cores at 2.7 GHz
256.0 GB of RAM providing 8.0 GB per core density
16 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with KVM virtualization
Strong performance in small-model LLM text generation
Optimized for relational databases and in-memory caching
